items.title: fix(slack): keep progress drafts in one message (#85612)
items.summary: fix(slack): keep progress drafts in one message (#85612) Keep Slack progress-mode drafts on one rolling preview message across assistant and reasoning boundaries while preserving boundary cleanup and the latest visible tool-progress lines. Partial/replace modes still start a fresh draft at assistant boundaries. Co-authored-by: Peter Steinberger

items.title: fix(discord): route thread bindings to plugin owners
items.summary: fix(discord): route thread bindings to plugin owners Route Discord thread follow-up messages to plugin-owned bindings by the raw thread id while retaining parent channel fallback matching. This fixes `/codex bind` follow-ups in Discord threads being claimed by the parent OpenClaw route instead of the bound Codex session. Verification: - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/channel.conversation.test.ts src/hooks/message-hook-mappers.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts -t "prefers bound session keys|passes Discord thread parent only|routes Discord thread plugin-owned bindings|passes thread parent ids|thread binding"` - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts -t "routes Discord thread plugin-owned bindings by raw thread id"` - `pnpm build` - `pnpm lint --threads=8` - `CI=true FORCE_COLOR=0 pnpm lint --threads=8` - `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` - GitHub: Real behavior proof, check-test-types, check-dependencies, check-prod-types, auto-reply dispatch shard, hooks shard, and extension package boundary passed on head 1e896d9835fb11c97d478e78b403c1f5aa74f701. Known unrelated CI noise at merge: broad opengrep/test/lint CI failures are outside the touched Discord/session-binding surface and contradicted by focused local proof where applicable. Co-authored-by: Hex

items.title: 駭客假借提供常見系統工具、濫用AI聊天機器人接觸受害者，意圖發動挖礦攻擊
items.summary: 在過往挖礦軟體攻擊當中，駭客可能選擇透過搜尋引擎最佳化中毒（SEO Poisoning）來接觸目標，盡可能地讓更多使用者上當，讓挖礦活動的收益最大化，不過有人採取更為細緻的方法過濾用戶，試圖接觸擁有更多GPU運算能力的電腦。
